# Extracao: goromance-2

- **Fonte:** goromance-2.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---



WOW - my heart is simply overflowing right now...

Yesterday I emailed you (and everyone else on my
GoRomance.com newsletter list) and I told you about my
daughter Abbie's upcoming wedding. And then I asked everyone
to send well wishes to Abbie and her fiance Jonathan, who
are getting married after a long distance relationship
(Jonathan was in Iraq as a second lieutenant in the
Marines).

In any case, the response was amazing! I have received over
200 heartwarming notes to give to Abbie and Jonathan... and
they are continuing to pour into my inbox. And so many of
them contain such wonderful words of wisdom! In a world with
so much turmoil and uncertainty, what an incredibly
beautiful touching gift!

I am compiling each and every response for Abbie and
Jonathan... I can't wait to see their response when they
read hundreds of notes from people all over the world - who
they have never met!

Thank you, thank you, thank you. What a blessing.

In fact, these notes are so lovely that I am going to put
them on a web page - there is just too much love in them to
not share them with the world.

And if you haven't sent in your response yet, there is still
time... just hit your reply button, type in your note, and
the press send.


With much appreciation, 
Leslie

P.S. extra thanks and hugs to everyone who reassured me
about going out on a limb and "asking" for your wonderful
well wishes.
